title: Folder ID - Add icons, tags and/or color code folders
excerpt: As we are unable to nest folders and subfolders, it would help my team to have some visual cues using colors or icons to identify corresponding folders. Allowing users to see color tags and filter the content.

posts.author: SuperKatzanova (Ryan Katz)
posts.cookedHtml: As we are unable to nest folders and subfolders, it would help my team to have some visual cues using colors or icons to identify corresponding folders. Allowing users to see color tags and filter the content.

posts.author: alejencia (Alex Becerra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SuperKatzanova the color shading has been a topic I’ve brought up quite a while ago.
maybe we can get traction if more of us request the feature, here are two other topics I can recall related to color coding/shading. You’ve got my vote

Column Color Shading Feature requests
Hi Monday.com community! I have a very massive board and in the board several Columns are clustered together to capture certain data. I was just thinking that it would be super awesome If we could (Select MULTIPLE Columns) and have a setting to color shade the columns … that way we can have a nice visual of the clusters / phases. This is what I mean. Current view … [image] with the feature view … [image]
Pulse Selection Visualization enhancement Feature requests
We have several massive boards that have a couple hundred pulses and would love it if once I select a pulse/multiple pulses, the back light of the pulse become stronger so that I know what pulse(s) have been selected. Currently as far as I can tell, there is no back light color that changes when you select the pulse(s). Just a visual enhancement that I think (hope) all would appreciate [image]

posts.author: caseyparnis (Casey Parnis)
posts.cookedHtml:
I didn’t see a newer topic about this but I’d like to see if the Monday team has any intention to pursue color coding or other visual cues for folders. Even a different color in the sidebar indicating a folder would be incredibly helpful. In the attached screenshots you can see a segment of our huge list of folders and boards which all kind of run into each other since they are currently all white, if folders could be a light gray or even just having the folder title text be bold it would make finding things much easier.

Original195×746 26.4 KB
Proposed Folder Colors195×746 28.6 KB

posts.author: zlanich (Zach Lanich)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree that this would be useful. We have a lot of folders and boards, and the ability to change things like icons/icon colors, etc would help us find things more quickly!
